svg.text: Client-side SPA · Nginx container (try_files /index.html) · Google OAuth redirect
Spring Cloud Gateway · JWT Validation · CORS · Route Load Balancing
Adaptive Rate Limiting (Redis) · X-User-Id header injection
All backend services self-register on startup
Consumer groups: analysis-expense · analysis-budget · notification-expense · notification-company
KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL=SSL · KAFKA_SSL_ENABLED=true · JKS keystores injected via docker volume
API Gateway: per-user rate limiting · active_users ZSET
Budget + Expense + Analysis: response caching (5-min TTL, write-path eviction)
Expenses · Approval Status · Category refs · Chart cache
* All services register with Eureka on startup · API GW resolves routes via Eureka · SSL certs at /app/certs · JWT_SECRET shared by API GW + user-service · artha-net Docker bridge network
